text: Such policy shall not contain any exclusions directed toward any types of projects, scope of work, materials, services, or processes involved in the Work.  The  retroactive  date  for  coverage  will  be  no  later  than  the commencement date of design and will state that in the event of cancellation or non-renewal the discovery period for insurance claims will be at least 5 years or as allowed by the statute of repose, whichever is longer, unless otherwise agreed to in writing by Owner.
